_comment: Schema for items — weapons, armor, consumables, accessories, crafting materials. One file per item in items/.
name: string — display name
tags: string — e.g. melee, ranged, fire, rare, two-handed
active: ability-id | null — usable ability granted by this item
applies: status-effect-id — always applied on hit or on use
may_apply: status-effect-id — pool of possible effects; AI or context selects which apply
notes: string — optional design intent or balance notes
